--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -2,17 +2,19 @@
 import torch.nn as nn

 

 class MLP(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, input_dim=4096, hidden_dim=1024, num_layers=4, num_tasks=128, dropout=0.1):

+    def __init__(self, input_dim=4096, hidden_dim=1536, num_layers=5, num_tasks=128, dropout=0.05):

         super().__init__()

-        layers = []

+        self.layers = nn.ModuleList()

         prev_dim = input_dim

         for _ in range(num_layers - 1):

-            layers.append(nn.Linear(prev_dim, hidden_dim))

-            layers.append(nn.ReLU())

-            layers.append(nn.Dropout(dropout))

+            self.layers.append(nn.Linear(prev_dim, hidden_dim))

+            self.layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim))

+            self.layers.append(nn.ReLU(inplace=True))

+            self.layers.append(nn.Dropout(dropout))

             prev_dim = hidden_dim

-        layers.append(nn.Linear(prev_dim, num_tasks))

-        self.net = nn.Sequential(*layers)

+        self.layers.append(nn.Linear(prev_dim, num_tasks))

 

     def forward(self, x):

-        return self.net(x)
+        for layer in self.layers:

+            x = layer(x)

+        return x
